definition.title: Freight Broker Positioning & Brokerage Pitch
definition.objective: Captures strategic positioning fork — leveraging brokers as distribution channel. Core message: 'Be the Brokerage.' Reframes brokers from middlemen to infrastructure enhancers.
definition.target_audience: Freight brokers, brokerage owners, logistics decision-makers. Primary platform: LinkedIn.
definition.cadence: Low to moderate frequency. LinkedIn primary. Use around partnerships, network growth, or distribution strategy discussio

campaign_card.target_audience: Freight brokers, brokerage owners, logistics decision-makers. Primary platform: LinkedIn.
key_messages: Be the Brokerage — offer terminal network access as a differentiator
Carrier loyalty is not about rate alone — infrastructure is the edge
Brokers touch thousands of carriers — they become network accelerators

initiatives: LinkedIn authority threads. 5-post broker advantage mini-campaign. Industry commentary posts. Case-study hypothetical content.

_legacy_card.description: Segment-specific pitch deck positioning LHS as industry-first opportunity for freight brokers to offer terminal network access, differentiate from other brokerages, and increase carrier loyalty.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Captures strategic positioning fork — leveraging brokers as distribution channel. Core message: 'Be the Brokerage.' Reframes brokers from middlemen to infrastructure enhancers.
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: LinkedIn targeted authority on broker differentiation. Niche campaigns. Industry commentary on market volatility and margin compression. Avoid blame language or middleman narrative.
_legacy_card.artlist_cost: Zero for static repurposing and LinkedIn text posts.
_legacy_card.repurposing: LinkedIn authority threads. 5-post broker advantage mini-campaign. Industry commentary posts. Case-study hypothetical content.
_legacy_card.timeline: Low to moderate frequency. LinkedIn primary. Use around partnerships, network growth, or distribution strategy discussions.
